boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; consent-status class pending
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: AUTH-BOR-082 and FEAS-BOR-082 leave defect open

final_answer: Source records indicate activation authority covers site, protocol, and date, but consent C12 remains pending per AUTH-BOR-082 and FEAS-BOR-082. Policy STD-BOR-082-P mandates a closed consent-status class before enrollment. The boundary remains open due to this unresolved dependency, preventing the action from proceeding.
